articles.title: Boeing 777X Receives Key FAA ETOPS Approval for Initial Testing
articles.content: The Federal Aviation Administration has granted limited ETOPS certification for the 777X test fleet...
articles.excerpt: FAA grants critical ETOPS window for 777X testing, moving the program closer to 2026 certification.

articles.title: Qantas Confirms Massive SAF Supply Deal with North American Bio-Refineries
articles.content: Qantas Airways has signed a multi-year deal for 500 million liters of Sustainable Aviation Fuel annually...
articles.excerpt: Qantas secures half a billion liters of SAF, pinning its carbon goals on the North American bio-corridor.

articles.title: Lufthansa-ITA Merger: EU Commissioners Drop Key Concession Requirements
articles.content: In a surprise move, EU antitrust regulators have softened their stance on the Lufthansa acquisition...
articles.excerpt: EU regulators soften stance on ITA merger, paving the way for a German-Italian aviation powerhouse.

articles.title: NASA X-59 Quiet Supersonic Jet Achieves First Stable Supersonic Cruise
articles.content: The X-59 QueSST experimental aircraft has successfully demonstrated its 'supersonic thump' technology...
articles.excerpt: The age of quiet supersonic travel is here: NASA X-59 cruises at Mach 1.4 without the window-breaking boom.

articles.title: Airbus Commits to Zero-E Hydrogen Hub at Singapore Changi
articles.content: Airbus and Changi Airport Group have signed a MoU to develop a world-first hydrogen distribution network...
articles.excerpt: Changi Airport to go hydrogen: Airbus partners with Singapore to build the infrastructure for the next generation of flight.

articles.title: Middle East Crisis: Airspace Closures Extended Over Levant Region
articles.content: Civil aviation authorities have announced a further 48-hour closure of several key corridors...
articles.excerpt: Global routing chaos as airspace closures over the Levant are extended, forcing massive reroutes.

articles.title: United Airlines Orders 20 Overture Supersonic Jets from Boom Supersonic
articles.content: United has moved from options to firm orders for its first supersonic passenger fleet...
articles.excerpt: The sonic boom returns to commercial aviation as United firms its order for 20 Boom Overture jets.

articles.title: Shell to Exit Aviation Fuel Business in South East Asia
articles.content: In a major strategic pivot, Shell has announced it will divest its airport refueling assets...
articles.excerpt: Energy giant Shell begins massive divestment from SE Asian aviation fueling hubs.

articles.title: Delta Airlines Predicts Record-Breaking Summer Capacity for 2026
articles.content: CEO Ed Bastian states that the airline is anticipating a 12% increase in passenger load factors...
articles.excerpt: Delta prepares for the busiest summer in history, projecting double-digit growth.

articles.title: Breaking: Emirates Announces Order for 50 Additional Boeing 777X Aircraft
articles.content: Emirates has surprised the industry with a massive order for 50 more Boeing 777X jets, signaling strong confidence in the program's recovery...
articles.excerpt: Emirates doubles down on the 777X with a 50-unit order at the Dubai Airshow.

articles.title: Defense: UK Ministry of Defence Awards GCAP Fighter Jet Contract to BAE Systems
articles.content: The UK MOD has finalized a multi-billion pound agreement for the development of the next-generation fighter jet...

articles.title: Horizon: Archer Aviation's Midnight eVTOL Completes Transition Flight
articles.content: In a major milestone for urban air mobility, Archer's Midnight aircraft has successfully transitioned from vertical takeoff to wing-borne flight...
articles.excerpt: Midnight eVTOL achieves full transition, paving the way for commercial service in 2026.

articles.title: Pulse: Severe Turbulence Incident Over North Atlantic Injures 12
articles.content: Flight AF012 encountered severe clear-air turbulence while crossing the Atlantic, forcing an emergency landing in Shannon...

articles.title: Market: Rolls-Royce Shares Surge on Record Engine Performance Data
articles.content: Rolls-Royce has reported better-than-expected time-on-wing performance for its Trent XWB engine series...
articles.excerpt: Trent XWB performance drives confidence in Rolls-Royce turnaround strategy.

articles.title: Live: Jet Fuel Prices in Singapore Reach 2-Year Lows

articles.excerpt: Asian jet fuel crack spreads narrow as regional supply hits record highs.

articles.title: Breaking: Japan's MRJ Project Officially Revived with New Hydrogen Focus
